prompt: A dramatic vertical poster-style mixed-media portrait with a gritty urban editorial aesthetic, designed like a concert or personal brand poster. Center a middle-aged man from the waist up, wearing a black T-shirt, standing slightly turned and raising one arm upward with his index finger pointing toward the top of the frame. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur block. Use a dark black and sepia color palette with distressed cream and gold accents, heavy grunge textures, ink splatters, scratched overlays, torn-paper brush marks, dust, and weathered print effects. Place a large muted gold circular halo behind his head and upper torso. In the background, create a collage of Córdoba city landmarks: a cathedral facade on the right side, a river with bridge and low skyline on the left side, all blended into the textured poster composition. Add oversized bold condensed serif typography at the top reading EDU PEREYRA, with “EDU” in large distressed off-white letters and “PEREYRA” below in gold. Add 5 smaller text groups around the composition in uppercase handwritten or condensed styles: top left “MÚSICA PASIÓN VERDAD”, top right “DESDE ADENTRO HACIA AFUERA”, mid-right “LO QUE SE SIENTE NO NECESITA EXPLICARSE”, mid-left “AGRADECER SEGUIR CREAR”, and bottom center “TIERRA DE HISTORIA, CORAZÓN DE GENTE.” Across the lower foreground, add a huge expressive brush-script word cordoba in off-white, slightly diagonal, with a gold underline swoosh. Include 3 small symbolic graphic accents: a tiny crown icon near the upper right, a small starburst ornament near the bottom center, and a handwritten signature mark at the lower right. The shirt should include vintage printed lettering and emblem graphics. Lighting is moody and contrasty, with the subject cut out sharply against the layered collage. Overall feel: raw, passionate, musical, spiritual, local-pride poster, premium distressed print design, high visual impact, cinematic and artisanal.
